repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.php: composer psr-4 autoload, phpunit tests, laravel and symfony conventions, declare strict_types, and exception handling
plain prose note with no repository or domain signal

retrieval_query: php composer psr-4 autoload composer.lock phpunit laravel symfony artisan eloquent strict_types exception namespace dependency injection

validation_smoke.name: code.php L3 validation smoke
signals: composer install reproduces vendor/ from composer.lock with no drift
phpunit suite is green and a new class is autoloaded without a manual require
declare(strict_types=1) is set in files whose contracts depend on it
framework boundary code has a test exercising the documented seam (service container, event)

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.php diagnosis smoke
signals: class loaded with require/include instead of PSR-4 autoload
composer.lock not committed so environments resolve different versions
type coercion bug from missing strict_types
Eloquent N+1 query from unbatched lazy relations
exception swallowed by an empty catch or the @ error-suppression operator
